title: Moderated researcher task-test (O5 <10-min find+cite)
context: O5 - a researcher finding, comparing, and correctly citing a model and its access terms in under 10 minutes - is one of the two real success signals; this moderated task-test measures it with independent researchers and files fixes (PLAN section 4, M3). Depends on the v0.5 release (016). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Run a moderated task-test with 3-5 independent researchers measuring time-to-find+cite, logging friction and filing fixes.
acceptanceCriteria: 3-5 independent researchers find, compare, and correctly cite a model + its access terms in <10 min; results + friction logged; fixes filed.
Methodology and results recorded in a review document; no participant PII published.
output: review/task-test-<date>.md recording methodology, per-participant results, friction, and filed fixes.
